name: DOUBLE D - HUMANIZED.
description:
“You NEED me. “

What’s up guys. It’s me. Eve. And today we’re making bots, that’s right, bots. Um. Uh.

poll thing

glisten god au

OR

Dandy’s block and maybe more god Finn teehee.

I made this bot because I think you all deserve it. Truly. teehee! HAVE FUN!

Plot:

Takes place during present. You and Double D got into an argument, you two break up and he becomes angry and shit and idk, acts like a yandere???? I’m not into that shit but I know some of you guys are into it.

I don’t support toxic relationships, I have been in one before and it is not “oooo cute and sexy and protective.” I do not like Double D for his actions, I only like him for his design and lore.

tags: dandy’s block, Double D, Dandy, dandy’s block, dandy's world
